auth.emailVerification.banner: Revisa tu bandeja de entrada para verificar el correo antes de comenzar la prueba gratuita.
auth.trialBlocked.alreadyUsedBody: Parece que ya usaste una prueba gratuita. Inicia sesión en tu cuenta o elige un plan para continuar.

auth.trialBlocked.emailNotVerifiedBody: Busca en tu bandeja el enlace de verificación. Cuando verifiques el correo, podrás empezar la prueba gratuita.
auth.trialBlocked.genericBody: Algo salió mal. Si ya tienes cuenta, inicia sesión o elige un plan abajo.
auth.trialBlocked.genericTitle: No se pudo iniciar la prueba
auth.trialBlocked.rateLimitedBody: Espera un momento antes de volver a intentarlo. Si ya tienes cuenta, inicia sesión.

auth.transition.emailVerified.title: You're ready to begin adaptive study.
auth.transition.emailVerified.messageRn: Your account is active. NCLEX-RN readiness tracking and your pathway unlock as soon as you sign in.
auth.transition.emailVerified.messageRpn: Your account is active. practical nursing readiness tracking and your pathway unlock as soon as you sign in.
auth.transition.emailVerified.messageNp: Your account is active. advanced practice readiness tracking and your pathway unlock as soon as you sign in.
auth.transition.emailVerified.messageGen: Your account is active. nursing readiness tracking and your pathway unlock as soon as you sign in.
auth.transition.emailVerified.help: We will pick up where you left off if you already started studying on this device.
auth.transition.emailVerified.verifyBann: You're ready to begin adaptive study.
Sign in to open your pathway and readiness tools.
auth.transition.sessionExpired.title: Your session paused while you were away.
auth.transition.sessionExpired.message: Your study progress is saved and ready to continue.
auth.transition.sessionExpired.helpDefau: Sign in again and we will return you to the same study session when possible.
auth.transition.oauth.title: Linking your NurseNest account
auth.transition.oauth.messageDefault: One moment — preparing your adaptive study workspace.
auth.transition.oauth.helpDefault: Adaptive profile and pathway preferences are syncing.

auth.transition.signUp.title: Your NurseNest account is on its way.
auth.transition.signUp.message: Check your inbox to verify your email, then sign in to unlock adaptive study.
auth.transition.signUp.help: Did not receive it? Check spam or request a new link after signing in.
auth.transition.signUp.loadingDetail: Check your inbox to verify your email
auth.transition.whatsNext.rn1Detail: Adaptive warm-up for your NCLEX track
auth.transition.whatsNext.rn2Detail: See accuracy bands and weak areas
auth.transition.passwordReset.title: You're ready to sign in again.

auth.transition.passwordReset.help: We will return you to the same study session when possible.
auth.transition.passwordReset.loadingDet: You can sign in with your new password
auth.transition.magicLink.sentTitle: Your sign-in link is on the way.
auth.transition.magicLink.sentMessage: Open the email on this device to continue without a password.
auth.transition.magicLink.sentHelp: Links expire for security — request a new one from sign in if needed.
auth.transition.magicLink.confirmedMessa: Preparing your study workspace — this usually takes a moment.
auth.transition.magicLink.expiredMessage: Request a fresh link from the sign-in page when you are ready.
auth.transition.magicLink.expiredHelp: Your study progress remains saved on your account.
auth.transition.magicLink.invalidTitle: We could not use this sign-in link.
auth.transition.magicLink.invalidMessage: Try signing in with email and password, or request a new magic link.
auth.transition.accountRecovery.title: We'll help you get back to studying.
auth.transition.accountRecovery.message: If an account exists for that email, we sent recovery steps. Delivery can take a few minutes.
auth.transition.accountRecovery.help: Check spam or promotions. Contact support if you still cannot access your account.
auth.transition.accountRecovery.loadingD: Follow the steps in your inbox
auth.transition.authError.rateLimitedMes: Take a short pause, then try again.
auth.transition.authError.rateLimitedHel: This protects your account while keeping study data safe.
